tickmarkr plan — dry run (12 channels available)
mode: risk-based (default) · explore on

  T1     chore      c2  → claude-code:haiku [sub/cheap] — floor cheap (config floors), marginal-cost auto (cheapest sufficient tier)
    floor cheap ← mode risk-based

est. cost (API channels only, rough): ~$0.00 + judge/review/consult calls
